TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mayhuman, title = Mayhuman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mayhuman} }

S.FORM: Mayhuman Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Mayhuman a niyaro', 68 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 183 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 175 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal87%, Saysiyat7%, Cou1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: majħo~u~uman itiniaj i wo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u majħo~u~uman a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, sajsijat*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Mayhuman Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Mayhuman a niyaro', 68 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 183 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 175 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal87%, Saysiyat7%, Cou1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: majħo~u~uman itiniaj i wo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u majħo~u~uman a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, sajsijat*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
